response.justification: Candidate is a capable full-stack engineer with strong web/backend experience, but the role explicitly requires 8 years of C++ programming and 5 years building large-scale distributed infrastructure or cloud compute platforms. The resume shows only a brief C/C++ stint at National Instruments (~6 months, 2014-2015) and no demonstrated cloud compute platform or distributed systems leadership experience. Primary expertise is TypeScript/Node.js and DLang, which does not match the core C++ systems requirement.
strengths: Long tenure as senior/staff engineer with mentoring, workshops, and teaching experience
Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Polyglot systems experience including DLang low-latency, high-throughput services at Sociomantic
concerns: Far below the 8-year C++ requirement; only one short C/C++ role early in career
No evidence of large-scale cloud compute platform or distributed infrastructure ownership
No formal technical leadership role mentoring cloud/DevOps engineers at platform scale

key_factors.factor: Lack of cloud compute platform / distributed infra experience
